name: Moroccan Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 3-pound whole chickens, halved and backbones removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir caraway seeds in a heavy small skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 1 minute.
2. Transfer to a food processor.
3. Add the next 10 ingredients.
4. Puree until a coarse paste forms.
5. Rub the paste all over chicken halves.
6. Melt butter in a large pot over medium heat.
7. Add onions; sauté until beginning to soften, about 5 minutes.
8. Add chicken halves to the pot.
9. Add enough water to almost cover the chicken.
10. Bring to boil.
11. Reduce heat and cover; simmer until chicken is tender (turn once), about 45 minutes.
12. Transfer chicken, skin side up, to a baking sheet.
13. Add cilantro to liquid in the pot.
14. Boil until reduced to 3 cups, about 20 minutes.
15. Season with salt.
16. Meanwhile, preheat broiler.
17. Broil chicken until golden brown, about 6 minutes.
18. Transfer chicken to a platter.
19. Serve with braising liquid.
